steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice B is $g(x)=144(4)^x$, so B is correct.

steps.title: Interpret the horizontal shift algebraically
steps.content: The input $x+2$ goes into the exponent, so the base $4$ is multiplied by itself two extra times. That creates a factor of $4^2=16$, not a new base of $8$ or $16$.
